{{Quote|The officer wearing green patches is Captain Brast'alshi'barku, the line commander of this vessel—you may address him as Captain Talshib.|[[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]]|<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />}}
'''Brast'alshi'barku''', also known by his [[Core name/Legends|core name]] of '''Talshib''', was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] of the [[Brast family]] who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] in the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" /> In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> he served aboard the diplomatic ship ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' as a [[line commander]]. He wore green facings on his black [[Chiss officer's long tunic|uniform]], whereas his superior General [[Prard'ras'kleoni|Drask]] bore red trim.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Brast'alshi'barku first appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' written by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
